data.title: Naftali Group brings Private Members Club & Signature Restaurant by h.wood Group to Flagler Village in Fort Lauderdale. Celebrity-loved concept will offer exceptional service and lively atmosphere.

This exciting development is part of Viceroy Residences Fort Lauderdale, set to offer exceptional experiences to the community. The project is expected to elevate the local scene, attracting attention and foot traffic. The initiative, set for launch in January 23, 2026, is poised to bring a new level of sophistication to the neighborhood, blending celebrity-favorite concepts with top-notch hospitality. The collaboration promises to inject energy into Fort Lauderdale with an infusion of luxury and style.

data.title: IBKR focuses on utilities, not sports, in $63 billion prediction market boom; trades 286M contract pairs in Q4. Regulatory issues with sports platforms.
data.description: Interactive Brokers Group Inc. (NASDAQ: IBKR) and Robinhood Markets Inc. (NASDAQ: HOOD) have different strategies in the growing $63 billion prediction market industry. IBKR focuses on temperature contracts for utilities, not sports betting, with 286 million contract pairs traded in Q4, up from 15 million in Q3, and over 10,000 instruments listed. In contrast, Robinhood's sports contracts face regulatory issues, as a Massachusetts court deemed them illegal gambling, not regulated derivatives. IBKR aims to onboard institutional clients, while Robinhood's focus on sports faces regulatory challenges. Peterffy, IBKR's CEO, emphasized their avoidance of sports betting during their Q4 earnings call.

data.title: Bloomberg strategist predicts end of Bitcoin trade in 2026, cites bearish outlook on market.
data.description: Commodity strategist Mike McGlone from Bloomberg has recently shifted to a bearish stance on Bitcoin, as well as the overall market forecast for 2026. McGlone shared his updated outlook on Bitcoin's performance, highlighting potential challenges ahead. The strategist discussed broader market expectations for the upcoming year and pointed out key factors influencing his bearish perspective. McGlone's insights offer valuable information for investors looking to navigate the volatile cryptocurrency landscape and anticipate market trends in the foreseeable future.

data.title: Attorney Andrew Rosenberg discusses ways to avoid probate in Wisconsin with tools like revocable living trusts and TOD deeds.
data.description: In Racine, Wisconsin, as of January 23, 2026, Attorney Andrew Rosenberg from Knuteson, Hinkston & Rosenberg, S.C., discussed strategies to bypass probate in the state. He highlighted the effectiveness of utilizing instruments such as revocable living trusts and transfer on death (TOD) deeds. These tools offer families the ability to manage their assets and properties seamlessly, avoiding the probate process that can be time-consuming and costly. By implementing these methods, individuals in Wisconsin can safeguard their estates and streamline the transfer of assets to beneficiaries efficiently.

data.title: Global meditation study by Dr. Joe Dispenza & HeartMath Institute show small groups can impact random devices worldwide.
data.description: A recent peer-reviewed study conducted by Dr. Joe Dispenza and HeartMath Institute has unveiled significant worldwide impacts of emotionally synchronized group meditation. This research, released on January 23, 2026, in San Diego, shows tangible results from collective meditation practices. The study provides insights into the benefits of group meditation on a global scale and highlights the effectiveness of emotional coherence. This groundbreaking research underscores the positive effects of synchronized meditation on a broader community level, shedding light on the potential for widespread change through collective mindfulness.

data.title: Study by RTI International shows significant variation in Medicaid patient retention rates in opioid treatment programs, indicating room for quality enhancement.
data.description: A recent study conducted by experts at RTI International, an independent scientific research organization based in Research Triangle Park, North Carolina, has been published in JAMA Network Open. The study focuses on opioid treatment programs and their level measures of retention. The findings indicate opportunities for quality improvement in these programs. The report was released on January 23, 2026. For more information, interested individuals can access the study published in JAMA Network Open.

data.title: Government Relations Expert Nicole Rongo explains why the USCM Winter Meeting in DC draws attention.

The meeting's coverage underscores its significant role in facilitating dialogue among municipal leaders, with attendance numbers reaching notable figures. Additionally, media organizations consistently follow the developments at the conference, highlighting its relevance in shaping public policy and promoting collaboration among mayors nationwide.

data.title: NRG Energy, Inc. increases quarterly dividend to $0.475 per share, $1.90 per share annually, in line with target growth rate.
data.description: In Houston, NRG Energy, Inc. (NYSE: NRG) disclosed a quarterly dividend of $0.475 per share, amounting to $1.90 yearly. This marks an 8% rise from last year and aligns with the firm's target annual dividend growth rate of 7-9% per share. Shareholders of NRG as of February 2, 2026, will receive this dividend on February 17, 2026. NRG is a well-known energy company.

data.title: BBWI investors affected by losses urged to contact Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP for securities fraud class action filed. Seek recovery for losses between June 4, 2024, and November 19, 2025.
data.description: If you suffered losses from investing in Bath & Body Works, Inc. (NYSE: BBWI) securities between June 4, 2024, and November 19, 2025, you may be eligible for recovery. A class action lawsuit has been filed regarding securities fraud involving BBWI. Investors who purchased or acquired BBWI securities during this period are seeking compensation for their losses.

data.title: Toews Corporation launches Hedged Nasdaq-100® ETF via '351 ETF Exchange', image removed from release.
data.description: Toews Corporation has announced the launch of a new Hedged Nasdaq-100® ETF, which aims to address the tax gap. The ETF will be seeded by the innovative '351 ETF Exchange'. The news was released on 21-Jan-2026, with Toews Agility Shares Hedged Nasdaq-100 ETF being the focal point.
